channel.title: Comments for page "Aryanne's Tail"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Aryanne's Tail"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I did enjoy bits of this (and the ending is fairly funny), but… It feels like it's trying really hard to make a joke that I don't get. I mean, yeah, I get most of the references, and I read 2089… but this feels significantly more muddled than its source material.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Wait, i thought aryanna wanted John dead.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
My first tale on this site. I'd like to consider this the backstory of SCP-2089, or rather John himself. If you haven't read it yet, check it out.

I'd like to give credit to Dr_Leonard for looking over my tale and helping me fix some sentences here and there.
